import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    """
    Reward for picking up the blue pyramid.
    
    Tile IDs: PYRAMID=5, FLOOR=1
    Color IDs: BLUE=3
    """
    PYRAMID = 5
    BLUE = 3
    
    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    
    # Check if agent is holding a blue pyramid in next_state
    holding_blue_pyramid = (
        (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & 
        (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == BLUE)
    )
    
    # Check if agent was already holding blue pyramid in current state
    was_holding_blue_pyramid = (
        (state.agent.pocket[0] == PYRAMID) & 
        (state.agent.pocket[1] == BLUE)
    )
    
    # Sparse reward: +1 for successfully picking up blue pyramid (first time)
    just_picked_up = holding_blue_pyramid & (~was_holding_blue_pyramid)
    success_reward = jax.lax.select(just_picked_up, jnp.float32(1.0), jnp.float32(0.0))
    
    # Dense shaping: reward based on distance to the blue pyramid
    # Find the blue pyramid position in current state
    ys, xs = jnp.meshgrid(jnp.arange(H), jnp.arange(W), indexing='ij')
    
    pyramid_mask = (
        (state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & 
        (state.grid[:, :, 1] == BLUE)
    )
    
    pyramid_count = jnp.sum(pyramid_mask)
    pyramid_y = jnp.sum(ys * pyramid_mask) / jnp.maximum(pyramid_count, 1)
    pyramid_x = jnp.sum(xs * pyramid_mask) / jnp.maximum(pyramid_count, 1)
    
    agent_y = next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x = next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    
    dist = jnp.abs(agent_y - pyramid_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - pyramid_x)
    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W)
    
    # Normalized distance reward (closer = higher reward)
    # Only provide this shaping when pyramid exists and not yet holding it
    pyramid_exists = pyramid_count > 0
    not_holding = ~holding_blue_pyramid
    
    proximity_reward = jax.lax.select(
        pyramid_exists & not_holding,
        (max_dist - dist) / max_dist * jnp.float32(0.01),
        jnp.float32(0.0)
    )
    
    # Small reward for having blue pyramid in front (encourages pickup action)
    DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)], dtype=jnp.int32)
    dy = DIRECTIONS[next_state.agent.direction, 0]
    dx = DIRECTIONS[next_state.agent.direction, 1]
    front_y = jnp.clip(next_state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy, 0, H - 1)
    front_x = jnp.clip(next_state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx, 0, W - 1)
    
    front_is_blue_pyramid = (
        (next_state.grid[front_y, front_x, 0] == PYRAMID) &
        (next_state.grid[front_y, front_x, 1] == BLUE)
    )
    
    facing_reward = jax.lax.select(
        front_is_blue_pyramid & not_holding,
        jnp.float32(0.02),
        jnp.float32(0.0)
    )
    
    total_reward = success_reward + proximity_reward + facing_reward
    return total_reward.astype(jnp.float32)
